description: Configure a 'watch the watcher' security alert in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus (http://localhost:8081) using credentials admin/Admin@2024. Create an Alert Profile named 'ADAudit Configuration Monitor' with the description 'Alert on changes to auditing configuration'. The profile should track changes to ADAudit Plus itself (using 'Configuration History' or 'All Configuration Changes' event profiles) with a 'Critical' severity. The alert message must include the technician name variable followed by 'modified configuration'. Ensure the alert is enabled and visible in the system.
